initialValue:
name: Promote Orders API
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      image_digest:
        description: Tested image digest
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo "Using ${{ inputs.image_digest }}"

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - run: ./scripts/deploy-ecs.sh orders-api-staging "${{ inputs.image_digest }}"
      - run: ./scripts/smoke.sh https://orders-api-staging.polaris.example

  deploy-production:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: ./scripts/deploy-ecs.sh orders-api-prod "${{ inputs.image_digest }}"
      - run: ./scripts/smoke.sh https://orders-api.polaris.example

expected.label: workflow uses a production concurrency group
production deploys do not cancel an in-flight release
production depends on build and deploy-staging
production job uses the production environment
production environment includes the public URL
